title: image/docker: use unified configfile for registries.d
body:
Switch registries.d loading to use `configfile.Read()`, enabling
unified drop-in search across /usr, /etc, and user config directories.
Files are merged with standard precedence, with higher-priority paths
masking lower ones.

Preserve explicit RegistriesDirPath override behavior.

Signed-off-by: Jan Kaluza <jkaluza@redhat.com>

comments.body: This depends on https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/711. If someone wants to review this early, check only the last commit.
Just a note to myself and others: this PR is waiting for new Read option from https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/773.
The skopeo tests are broken with this PR. I'm investigating why.
That fixed skopeo tests. The remaining test failures are infra issues :-(.
The usual question did you run this through podman/buildah CI? Just to ensure we do not need any code or test fixes.

@Luap99 , thanks for reminder:

- https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28598
- https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6815

It's still running.
I will merge once https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28570 lands unless @mtrmac finds something here in the meantime.
